pattern: CSS custom properties for Apple spacing
anti_pattern: Hardcoded pixel values scattered across stylesheets
notes: Single source of truth for spacing scale

implementation: motion.div animate={{ opacity: 1 y: 0 }} transition={{ type: spring stiffness: 300 damping: 30 }}
anti_pattern: CSS ease-in-out transitions for interactive elements
notes: Spring physics match Apple's UIKit spring feel
SF Pro on Apple devices; Inter on others

anti_pattern: Static color values without dark mode variants
notes: Variables flip values in dark mode automatically
System-level dark mode without JS dependency
Signature Apple frosted glass for navigation

implementation: border-radius: 20px combined with SVG squircle mask or clip-path
notes: True squircle matches Apple device corner shape

implementation: min-height: 44px; min-width: 44px on all interactive elements
notes: Meets Apple HIG minimum tap target size

anti_pattern: Random font sizes without a defined scale
notes: iOS-matched type scale for web counterparts
Apple's default easing curve from Core Animation

implementation: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit minmax(300px 1fr)); gap: 24px
notes: Modern layout matching Apple's grid system

implementation: cursor: pointer; pointer-events: auto on interactive non-button elements
anti_pattern: Missing cursor feedback on custom interactive elements
notes: Matches native app tap feedback expectation

implementation: aria-label="Close dialog" role="button" on custom interactive elements
anti_pattern: Missing aria attributes on icon-only buttons
notes: Required for VoiceOver compatibility matching HIG
Respects iOS Reduce Motion accessibility setting

anti_pattern: No scroll margin causing content hidden under fixed nav
notes: Prevents content jumping under navbar on scroll-to
Adapts to Dynamic Island and home indicator

anti_pattern: Default browser letter-spacing on display text
notes: Tight tracking is the defining Apple typographic trait
Apple uses oversized bold headlines as primary brand element

anti_pattern: Tight sections with minimal vertical spacing
notes: Apple sites use breathing room between content blocks

implementation: will-change: transform on elements that animate position
anti_pattern: Applying will-change to all elements globally
notes: Hints browser to composite layer for smooth animation
Performant scroll-linked animations without jank

anti_pattern: Removing outline entirely with outline: none
notes: Keyboard navigation visibility matching Apple's blue focus

implementation: loading="lazy" decoding="async" on all below-fold img elements
notes: Reduces initial page weight and matches native lazy patterns

implementation: max-width: 980px; margin-inline: auto on text content sections
notes: Apple constrains reading width for comfortable line length

anti_pattern: No color scheme meta causing flash of wrong theme
notes: Prevents flash of unstyled content on dark mode load
